field.name: ma_cm
field.check: ma_cm not in (select ma_cm from sfdmcummay)

field.name: tk_cptt
field.check: tk_cptt <> '' and tk_cptt not in (select tk from dmtk)

field.name: tk_cpgt
field.check: tk_cpgt <> '' and tk_cpgt not in (select tk from dmtk)

field.name: tk_cpql
field.check: tk_cpql <> '' and tk_cpql not in (select tk from dmtk)

processing.text: if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'SFCMachineList', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @q nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @irregularChars varchar(128), @field varchar(32), @r int select @irregularChars = &IrregularValue; select @irregular = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell có chứa các ký tự: ' + @irregularChars else 'The value of cell %invalidCell contains any of the following characters: ' + @irregularChars end select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell đã có hoặc lồng nhau.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is invalid or already exists.' end alter table @@table alter column ma_may char(32) create index i on @@table (ma_may) -- Delete if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a join sfdmmay b on a.ma_may = b.ma_may -- Checking &Checking; select @field = 'ma_may', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_may like '%[' + @irregularChars + ']%'&Irregular; -- Gather select a.*, a.cp_tt + a.cp_gt + a.cp_ql as cp_dv into #k from @@table a join sfdmmay b on a.ma_may = b.ma_may -- Do not delete following line -- #OverwriteChecking if @type = '1' delete @@table from @@table a where exists(select 1 from #k b where a.ma_may = b.ma_may) -- Checking select @field = 'ma_may' select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_may <> b.ma_may and a.ma_may like rtrim(b.ma_may) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, sfdmmay b with (index(PK_sfdmmay)) where a.ma_may like rtrim(b.ma_may) + '%'&Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = b.stt from sfdmmay a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_may like rtrim(b.ma_may) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; -- Insert &Inserting; -- Update if @type = '1' begin &Updating; end
